scenarios.postgresql:
WITH RECURSIVE org AS (
  SELECT  id,name,mgr_id,1 lvl
  FROM emp 
WHERE mgr_id IS NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT e.id,e.name,
e.mgr_id,o.lvl+1
  FROM emp e 
JOIN org o
  ON e.mgr_id = o.id
)
SELECT * FROM org;
